title: BlockOps MCP Tool Catalog
description: JSON Schema for the 22 backend tools exposed to LangGraph / CrewAI agents via the BlockOps MCP server. Pricing tier is sourced from backend/utils/chains.js TOOL_PRICING; see docs/x402.md.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get the native CSPR balance (motes + CSPR) for a Casper public key via CSPR.cloud.

public_key.description: Casper ed25519 public key (hex, with 0x/01/02 prefix)

tools.name: transfer
tools.description: Sign + broadcast a native CSPR transfer via CSPR.click.

tools.name: batch_transfer
tools.description: Sign + broadcast a batch CSPR transfer (≤ 25 recipients per call).

tools.name: deploy_cep18
tools.description: Deploy a CEP-18 (ERC-20-equivalent) token contract on Casper Testnet.

tools.name: deploy_cep78
tools.description: Deploy a CEP-78 (ERC-721-equivalent) NFT collection contract on Casper Testnet.

tools.name: mint_nft
tools.description: Mint a new NFT from a previously deployed CEP-78 collection.

tools.name: get_token_info
tools.description: Look up a CEP-18 token's name, symbol, decimals, total supply via CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: get_token_balance
tools.description: Look up a CEP-18 token balance for an account via CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: get_nft_info
tools.description: Look up a CEP-78 NFT's metadata + owner via CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: lookup_deploy
tools.description: Look up a deploy's execution results via the Casper RPC.

tools.name: lookup_block
tools.description: Look up a block by height or hash via the Casper RPC.

tools.name: fetch_price
tools.description: Fetch CSPR market price (USD + 24h change) via CoinGecko / CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email via the BlockOps transactional provider (Resend / SendGrid).

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a math expression locally (no on-chain effect).

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register an AI agent on the Casper AgentFactory contract. x402 payment required.

tools.name: attest_agent
tools.description: Submit a positive/negative attestation for an agent on the Reputation contract. x402 payment required.

tools.name: get_reputation
tools.description: Look up the current reputation score + history for an agent.

tools.name: yield_rebalance
tools.description: Rebalance treasury allocation across Casper staking validators. x402 payment required.

tools.name: wallet_readiness
tools.description: Check whether a Casper public key is ready to receive on-chain interactions (CSPR balance, faucet eligibility, last activity).

tools.name: compliance_check
tools.description: Run a compliance check against the on-chain Compliance contract allowlist.

tools.name: escrow_deposit
tools.description: Deposit CSPR into the Escrow contract for an agent payout. x402 payment required.

tools.name: escrow_payout
tools.description: Trigger an agent payout from the Escrow contract (operator-only). x402 payment required.
